description_long: This object is a firearm with a sleek, elongated black metal body and a wooden grip panel on each side, featuring a smooth, polished finish. The barrel is cylindrical and extends straight from the main body, with a rounded muzzle and no visible ribbing or venting. The grip is ergonomically shaped, made of a warm brown wood, and attached with two visible screws on each side. The trigger is housed within a rounded metal trigger guard, and the overall design is compact and streamlined, lacking any external pump, lever, or stock extension. The top of the firearm is smooth, with minimal protrusions or sights. The object appears to be a handgun rather than a traditional shotgun, based on its proportions and features.
description: A compact black firearm with a polished wooden grip and a smooth, streamlined metal body. The design is simple, with a rounded trigger guard and no visible stock or pump.
description_view_0: The object is viewed directly from the front, showing the circular muzzle and the end of the barrel.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the full length of the barrel, the wooden grip panel, and the rounded trigger guard.
description_view_2: The top-down view highlights the smooth, uninterrupted surface of the barrel and the narrow profile of the grip.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, displaying the wooden grip panel and the overall streamlined shape.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized, smooth with no finger grooves or reinforcement
